name: Maple Pecan Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, combine flour, cornmeal, baking powder, baking soda, and salt; set aside.
3. In another mixing bowl, cream together butter, brown sugar, eggs, maple syrup, and buttermilk until well blended.
4. Gradually stir in the dry ingredients just until moistened.
5. Fold in pecans.
6. Pour batter into a greased 8 1/2-inch x 4 1/2-inch x 2 1/2-inch loaf pan.
7. Bake for 35-40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Remove from oven and let cool in the pan for 10 minutes before serving warm with syrup, if desired, or allow to cool completely.
Yield: 1 loaf.
